view.title: Survey Captured Vessel {id}
view.reinstallNote: Ye can re-commission from the port menu
view.cpanelNote: The helm needs to be installed on a clean charter install with no modifications. If there be any cargo it will be lost.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to resend the welcome dispatch?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome dispatch has been resent. Check yer crow's nest.

order.title: Commission Captured Vessel
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Secret Countersign must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and a special character.
order.subscriptionRenewal: The subscription will automatically weigh anchor again after {period} at {cost} until ye cancel yer commission.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By checking this box, ye acknowledge that ye are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews and is billed to the Letter of Credit ye provide today. If ye wish to cancel yer auto-renewal, ye may access the captain's portal, select the active vessel and click the Stand Down link or send a message in a bottle to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Ship's Articles and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Issue My Orders below, ye also acknowledge ye have read, understand, and agree to our Ship's Articles and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have read the ship's articles above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional Ship's Coordinates Addon for yer Captured Vessel

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Cargo Hold Space
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional cargo hold space can be purchased

changeRootPassword.title: Change Captured Vessel Master Access Passphrase
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Countersign and Confirm Secret Countersign do not match

changeTimezone.title: Change {module} Ship's Time Zone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Ye should heave to yer {module} completely before changing the ship's time zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Captured Vessel will be Powered OFF and cast off again during the process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The ship's time zone on this page will always default to America/New_York regardless of what yer ship be set to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Change Webuzo Admiral Secret Countersign
changeWebuzoPassword.portalLoginPassword: Our Captain's Portal Login Secret Countersign
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Countersign and Confirm Secret Countersign do not match

reinstallOs.title: Re-Commission Ship's Operating Charter
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-commissioning the Ship's Operating Charter will jettison all cargo.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-commissioning the Ship's Operating Charter, please stow a backup in the treasure hold.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I want to re-commission the Ship's Operating Charter!

resetPassword.title: Reset Captured Vessel Master Access Passphrase
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows passphrase reset will result in an unclean shut down. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no updates are currently running. If an update be running VNC will show: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Shutting down in this state can result in an unbootable ship.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I want to Reset the Master Access Passphrase!

reverseDns.title: Reverse Navigation Chart (DNS)
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse navigation charts take up to an hour to show up.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop be a quick and convenient way to connect to a captured vessel's helm.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Admiral Master Access Passphrase must first be set on the Captured Vessel before ye can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set yer initial passphrase.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows ye to connect to the captured vessel's helm. VNC can be run in the browser or as a stand-alone client. Yer ship's coordinates must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Yer Ship's Coordinates Access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Please wait 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: Ye can also haul aboard one of the many VNC clients available on the internet. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using yer Captured Vessel's Ship's Coordinates. Passphrase is not required after yer remote Ship's Coordinates has been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Setup VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Ship's Coordinates to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Ship's Coordinates

insertCd.insertIso: Insert ISO Image In CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Treasure caches will only work with default partitioning.
backup.confirmBackup: Do ye really want to stash a treasure cache?

restore.offlineNote: Yer ship will be offline while it replaces all yer current cargo with that from the treasure cache. Please contact the Admiral's Council with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Login Secret Countersign to Validate Restore.
restore.confirmRestore: Do ye really want to restore this treasure cache?

trafficUsage.title: Wind in the Sails / Traffic Usage
trafficUsage.billingNote: This be not used for plunder calculations and is an estimate only based on yer virtual rigging.

slices.title: Upgrade / Downgrade Slices
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Slices can be lashed to a Captured Vessel.
slices.proratedNote: Prorated doubloons to be settled now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring plunder will change by this much
slices.newInvoiceNote: New Bills of Plunder will cost this much
slices.confirmLabel: Aye, I want to do this.
